Account Pending Approval

Your account has been created and is awaiting approval from an administrator. You'll be able to sign in once your account is approved.

What happens next?
  • An admin, owner, or instructor will review your account
  • You'll be able to sign in once approved
  • Contact your flight school directly if you need urgent access

    Prominent call-to-action bar below the hero

    This amber banner appears between the hero and about sections. Toggle it on/off without losing your content.

    Add custom text blocks that appear as overlays on top of any section. Great for announcements, callouts, or additional information.

    Colors

    Font & color changes apply to the public website at newtechaviation.com. Save & Publish to see them live.

    (function() { var _cmsPos = {}; try { _cmsPos = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(window.parent.elementPositions || {})); } catch(e) {} function getKey(el) { return el.getAttribute('data-cms-edit') || el.getAttribute('data-cms-key'); } function initEl(el) { if (el._cmsInit) return; el._cmsInit = true; if (!el._cmsWrap) { el._cmsWrap = doc.createElement('div'); el._cmsWrap.className = 'cms-el-wrap'; el.parentNode && el.parentNode.insertBefore(el._cmsWrap, el); el._cmsWrap.appendChild(el); var ov = doc.createElement('div'); ov.className = 'cms-el-overlay'; el._cmsWrap.appendChild(ov); var hd = doc.createElement('div'); hd.className = 'cms-hd'; var lb = doc.createElement('span'); lb.className = 'cms-hd-label'; hd.appendChild(lb); el._cmsWrap.appendChild(hd); ['nw','ne','sw','se'].forEach(function(c) { var rz = doc.createElement('div'); rz.className = 'cms-rz ' + c; el._cmsWrap.appendChild(rz); }); } var k = getKey(el); if (k) { var disp = k.replace(/_/g,' ').replace(/\b\w/g, function(c){ return c.toUpperCase(); }); el._cmsWrap.querySelector('.cms-hd-label').textContent = disp; } var k2 = getKey(el); if (_cmsPos[k2]) { var p = _cmsPos[k2]; el._cmsWrap.style.top = p.top + 'px'; el._cmsWrap.style.left = p.left + 'px'; if (p.width) el._cmsWrap.style.width = p.width + 'px'; if (p.height) el._cmsWrap.style.height = p.height + 'px'; } el._cmsWrap.classList.add('cms-ready'); } function selEl(el) { doc.querySelectorAll('.cms-el-wrap').forEach(function(w){ w.classList.remove('cms-selected'); }); if (el._cmsWrap) el._cmsWrap.classList.add('cms-selected'); var k = getKey(el); if (k && window.parent && window.parent.postMessage) { window.parent.postMessage({ type: 'cms-canvas-select', cmsKey: k }, '*'); } } function dragEl(el) { el.onmousedown = function(e) { if (e.target.classList.contains('cms-rz') || e.target.classList.contains('cms-hd')) return; e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation(); selEl(el); var wrap = el._cmsWrap; var sx = e.clientX, sy = e.clientY; var ot = wrap.offsetTop, ol = wrap.offsetLeft; function mv(ev) { wrap.style.top = (ot + (ev.clientY - sy)) + 'px'; wrap.style.left = (ol + (ev.clientX - sx)) + 'px'; } function up(ev) { document.removeEventListener('mousemove', mv); document.removeEventListener('mouseup', up); var k = getKey(el); if (k && window.parent) { window.parent.postMessage({ type: 'cms-canvas-move', cmsKey: k, pos: { top: wrap.offsetTop, left: wrap.offsetLeft } }, '*'); } } document.addEventListener('mousemove', mv); document.addEventListener('mouseup', up); }; } function rzEl(el) { el._cmsWrap.querySelectorAll('.cms-rz').forEach(function(rz) { rz.onmousedown = function(e) { e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation(); var wrap = el._cmsWrap; var c = rz.classList.contains('nw') ? 'nw' : rz.classList.contains('ne') ? 'ne' : rz.classList.contains('sw') ? 'sw' : 'se'; var sx = e.clientX, sy = e.clientY; var ow = wrap.offsetWidth, oh = wrap.offsetHeight; var ot = wrap.offsetTop, ol = wrap.offsetLeft; function mv(ev) { var dx = ev.clientX - sx, dy = ev.clientY - sy; if (c === 'se') { wrap.style.width = Math.max(40, ow + dx) + 'px'; wrap.style.height = Math.max(30, oh + dy) + 'px'; } else if (c === 'sw') { wrap.style.width = Math.max(40, ow - dx) + 'px'; wrap.style.left = (ol + dx) + 'px'; wrap.style.height = Math.max(30, oh + dy) + 'px'; } else if (c === 'ne') { wrap.style.width = Math.max(40, ow + dx) + 'px'; wrap.style.height = Math.max(30, oh - dy) + 'px'; wrap.style.top = (ot + dy) + 'px'; } else if (c === 'nw') { wrap.style.width = Math.max(40, ow - dx) + 'px'; wrap.style.left = (ol + dx) + 'px'; wrap.style.height = Math.max(30, oh - dy) + 'px'; wrap.style.top = (ot + dy) + 'px'; } } function up(ev) { document.removeEventListener('mousemove', mv); document.removeEventListener('mouseup', up); var k = getKey(el); if (k && window.parent) { window.parent.postMessage({ type: 'cms-canvas-resize', cmsKey: k, pos: { top: wrap.offsetTop, left: wrap.offsetLeft, width: wrap.offsetWidth, height: wrap.offsetHeight } }, '*'); } } document.addEventListener('mousemove', mv); document.addEventListener('mouseup', up); }; }); } function initAll() { [ '[data-cms-edit]', '[id^=cms-]' ].forEach(function(sel) { doc.querySelectorAll(sel).forEach(function(el) { if (el.tagName === 'LINK' || el._cmsInit) return; initEl(el); rzEl(el); dragEl(el); el.addEventListener('click', function(e) { e.stopPropagation(); selEl(el); }); }); }); } initAll(); doc.addEventListener('click', function(e) { if (e.target === doc.body || e.target === doc.documentElement) { doc.querySelectorAll('.cms-el-wrap').forEach(function(w){ w.classList.remove('cms-selected'); }); } }); })();

    Add Section

    Select a section to add it to your page

    Delete section?

    This section will be removed from the live site. Content is preserved and you can restore it via "Add Section".

    ⚙️ Admin Settings

    Manage platform-wide settings and data.

    🌍 Locations / Bases

    Manage airport bases for fleet and weather. Default location is used for new aircraft.

    📦 Data Backup

    Email a complete ZIP backup of all operational data (9 organized CSV files) to aviationnewtech@gmail.com. Runs automatically before any reset.

    ⚠️ Danger Zone

    This will permanently delete ALL flight data, hours, billing, and training history. User accounts and aircraft definitions will be preserved.

    📦 Download Source Code

    Download a ZIP archive of the complete codebase, database schema, and documentation. Generated fresh on demand — always reflects the current state of the app.

    FlightSlate_Source_YYYYMMDD.zip
      ├── /src/           all source code
      ├── /database/     schema.sql + structure.md
      ├── /docs/          ARCHITECTURE, SETUP, FEATURES, API...
      └── README.md

    Set your weekly schedule and block off exception dates.

    ⛔ Exception Dates

    Instructor Availability

    Typical weekly schedules and effective hours for the date you select. Bookings outside these windows may still be possible — check the schedule or contact your CFI.

    📱 Phone App

    🔔 Push Notifications

    Enable push to get booking confirmations, cancellations, and maintenance alerts on your phone — even when the app is closed (installed home screen app).

    iPhone: install to home screen first (Safari), then enable push here. Android: install app, then tap Enable.

    💬 Messages

    Students, renters, and instructors can message each other. Owners and admins can read all conversations.

    Start a conversation

    New Booking

    1Hobbs / Tach
    2Squawks
    3Debrief

    Start values are auto-filled from the aircraft's last recorded reading.

    Flight Hobbs: —
    Flight Tach: —
    Flight Type (for logbook)
    Dual / Instruction Hours

    Total billable instruction time (preflight, flight, ground, debrief). Can exceed Hobbs time — e.g. 1.0 Hobbs with 2.0 dual for ground briefing.

    Report any aircraft discrepancies. Squawks go to admin/maintenance for review.

    Rate your student's performance on today's flight. This feeds into their training progress.

    ⚠️ Reset All Data

    This will permanently delete all operational data from the platform. A full data backup ZIP is emailed to aviationnewtech@gmail.com before deletion.

    The following will be deleted:
    ✓ All user Hobbs & Tach hours
    ✓ All booking history
    ✓ All flight logs
    ✓ All billing entries
    ✓ All instructor hours
    ✓ All ground sessions
    ✓ All training enrollments
    ✓ All training progress
    ✓ All debrief records
    ✓ All maneuver grades
    ✓ All squawk reports
    ✓ All at-risk records
    ✓ Aircraft Hobbs & Tach totals
    ✓ All student interventions
    Preserved: User accounts, aircraft definitions, endorsements, instructor rates, curriculum structure, website content

    Acknowledge Endorsement

    Your signature confirms you have reviewed this endorsement. It is optional but recommended.

    Student Signature

    Add Manual History Entry

    Charges are calculated automatically: Hobbs delta × aircraft rate + instruction hours × instructor rate.

    Required for billing — dual instruction charges apply to all types except Discovery.
